title: Izmaost's Autumnal Birch
description: Turn your birch forest into a magical autumn forest. Animated bushy leaves, log variants and more!
body:
## ⭐️Autumnal Birch⭐️ Izmaost's Autumnal Birch adds autumn colors and changes to the birch trees in Minecraft. Changes include animated leaf textures (with variants), log model variants and colormap changes to the birch forest biomes. Looks best, in my humble opinion, using [Lux Shaders](https://modrinth.com/shader/lux-v1).
## 📋 Requirements 📋 This pack does not require Optifine or any texture stitching mod to work. If you have any other leaf texture pack, put it under this one in the load order. For any issues, questions or requests feel free to reach out on KoFi! ## 🎨 My Creations 🎨 Here you can find resourcepacks made by me: [Izmaost's Animated Foliage](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/izmaosts-animated-foliage) [Izmaost's Animated Flora](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/izmaosts-animated-flora) [Izmaost's Floral Redstone](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/izmaosts-floral-redstone) [Izmaost's Minimalist Redstone](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/izmaosts-minimalistic-redstone) [Izmaost's Modern Kitchen](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/izmaosts-modern-kitchen) [Izmaost's Glazed Terracotta](https://modrinth.com/project/izmaosts-glazed-terracotta) [Izmaost's Softer Weather](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/izmaosts-softer-weather) [Izmaost's Autumnal Birch](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/izmaosts-autumnal-birch)
